name: code-research
description: Evaluations for code-research skill trigger accuracy

evals.name: trigger-positive-explicit
evals.description: Skill should trigger on explicit code-research invocations

prompts.input: 帮我深入研究这个项目的架构设计
prompts.reason: Request to deeply research project architecture

prompts.input: I want to deeply understand this codebase's design philosophy
prompts.reason: Request to understand design philosophy matches skill description

prompts.input: 研究一下这个项目的核心机制和数据流
prompts.reason: Request to research core mechanisms and data flow

prompts.input: Give me a comprehensive understanding of how this project works, including key algorithms and architectural decisions
prompts.reason: Deep understanding request covering architectural decisions and algorithms

evals.name: trigger-negative-surface-questions
evals.description: Skill should NOT trigger for surface-level or quick questions about code

prompts.reason: Simple question about a single function, not deep research

prompts.input: Fix the bug in this file
prompts.reason: Bug fix request, not a research task

prompts.input: How do I install this project?
prompts.reason: Installation question, not deep code research
